basic_details.job_title: RNSB Jr. Executive Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Rajkot Nagarik Sahakari Bank (RNSB) Jr. Executive (Trainee) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website rnsbindia.com. The RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) Recruitment 2026 invites eligible candidates to apply for the Jr. Executive (Trainee) post.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Jr. Executive (Trainee) is 30 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: First Class Graduate (Except Arts) OR Postgraduate (Except Arts) with 2 year course.
qualification.details: Jr. Executive (Trainee): First Class Graduate (Except Arts) OR Postgraduate (Except Arts) with a 2-year course. 2 years' experience in any Co-Operative bank or any financial institute is preferable. Candidates should be well-versed with computer knowledge (Freshers may apply).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RNSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.rajkot_nagarik_sahakari_bank_rnsb: First Class Graduate (Except Arts) OR Postgraduate (Except Arts) with 2 year course.

content_sections.heading: RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the RNSB Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Jr. Executive (Trainee): First Class Graduate (Except Arts) OR Postgraduate (Except Arts) with a 2-year course. 2 years' experience in any Co-Operative bank or any financial institute is preferable. Candidates should be well-versed with computer knowledge (Freshers may apply).

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit for Jr. Executive (Trainee) is 30 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RNSB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Jr. Executive (Trainee) position at Rajkot Nagarik Sahakari Bank is 21st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a First Class Graduate degree (excluding Arts) or a Postgraduate degree (excluding Arts) with a 2-year course to be eligible.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for the Jr. Executive (Trainee) role?
faq.answer: While 2 years of experience in a Co-Operative bank or financial institute is preferable, freshers with the required educational qualifications may also apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Jr. Executive (Trainee) post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Jr. Executive (Trainee) position is offered on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q6. In which state and city is this recruitment taking place?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for positions in Gujarat, specifically in the city of Morbi.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the RNSB Jr. Executive (Trainee) post?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted online through the official website or the direct application link provided.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Based on the available information, no application fee has been mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Jr. Executive (Trainee) role?
faq.answer: The selection process details are not explicitly mentioned here, and candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for comprehensive information.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The link to download the official notification PDF can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article.
